response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with strong web/backend background, but the role requires deep C++ expertise (8 years) and large-scale distributed cloud compute infrastructure leadership. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and primarily web/product engineering with JS/TS/DLang. No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture, formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers, or distributed systems at the scale required.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering track record with strong testing/TDD discipline
Mentoring and teaching experience via workshops, talks, and courses
Has shipped low-latency, high-throughput services (Sociomantic data integration)
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief C/C++ experience at NI
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting an internal cloud compute platform
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers in production cloud architecture

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform / distributed systems leadership
